item.name: Dashboards
Mastercard Used to Retrieve the Short-lived Url of a User's Dashboard to View Their Carbon Footprints and Contributions to Priceless Planet.

request.name: Mastercard Used to Retrieve the Short-lived Url of a User's Dashboard to View Their Carbon Footprints and Contributions to Priceless Planet.

description.content: It allows issuers to retrieve a short-lived URL for an enrolled user. An Issuer needs to load this URL within their application so that the user can view the dashboard in their preferred language. Currently, four languages are supported, including English, Spanish (Latin America), Swedish, and Polish.

query.description: Language preference (en-US - English, es-cr - Spanish (Costa Rica), es-cl - Spanish (Chile), sv - Swedish, pl-PL - Polish (Poland))

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier for a user enrolled into Carbon Calculator Experience platform.

response.name: The response object after decryption contains a short-lived URL along with an authentication token and its expiry time.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier for a user enrolled into Carbon Calculator Experience platform.

response.name: This response code is returned when a request is invalid or data in the request is not valid.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier for a user enrolled into Carbon Calculator Experience platform.

response.name: This response code is returned when a user and the Issuer are unauthorized.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier for a user enrolled into Carbon Calculator Experience platform.

response.name: This response code is returned when a user or Issuer is not present.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier for a user enrolled into Carbon Calculator Experience platform.

item.name: Deletions
Mastercard Delete One or More Users.

request.name: Mastercard Delete One or More Users.

description.content:
• Allows a registered Service Provider to delete one or more users.
  • Payment cards associated with the user will also be deleted.
  • On a successful response from the Server, the Service Provider should remove all the requested users and associated payment cards from the system.

response.name: The response object contains a list of deleted user IDs
This response code is returned when a request is invalid or data in the request is not valid.
This response code is returned when a user is terminated or inactive.
This response code is returned when a user or Issuer is not present.
This response code is returned when the MediaType in the request is other than application/json format.

item.name: Issuer

description.content: Contains APIs which will be consumed by the Issuer's backend system.

item.name: Mastercard Fetches the Issuer Details.

description.content: Allows fetching the Issuer details onboarded on the Carbon Calculator Experience. This API returns the Issuer's available details like a supported account range, currency code, and country code along with the color theme.

response.name: The response object contains the latest information of an Issuer as available on the server.
response.body:
{
  "clientId": "fjl2fxzsYl1OpvxkBItC9nVw1PSQc_b-eQMcmQFg011ab4b5",
  "customerId": "45678",
  "issuerName": "ABC Bank",
  "supportedAccountRange": "534403,518145,518152,5403,5424",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "email": "xyz@abc.com",
  "currencyCode": "USD",
  "countryCode": "USA",
  "countryName": "United States of America",
  "termsAndConditionURL": "https://www.issuer.term-and-conditions.html",
  "privacyNoticeURL": "https://www.issuer.privacy-policy-url.html",
  "optOutURL": "https://www.issuer.opt-out-url.html",
  "preferredTheme": {
    "backgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "widgetBackgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "fontColor": "#000000",
    "barGraphColor": "#111111",
    "buttonColor": "#999999",
    "buttonTextColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "titleFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "titleFontSize": "28px",
    "subTitleFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "subTitleFontSize": "20px",
    "paragraphFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "paragraphFontSize": "15px",
    "buttonTextFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "buttonTextFontSize": "15px",
    "linkFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "linkFontSize": "15px"
  }
}

response.name: This response code is returned when a user and the Issuer are unauthorized.
This response code is returned when the server cannot find the account which has been used to call the API.

item.name: Mastercard Allows Issuer to Update the Issuer Details to the Carbon Calculator Experience Platform.

request.name: Mastercard Allows Issuer to Update the Issuer Details to the Carbon Calculator Experience Platform.

description.content: Allows a registered Issuer to update the configuration details to the Carbon Calculator Experience API.

response.name: The response object that contains the latest information of an Issuer as available on the server.
response.body:
{
  "clientId": "fjl2fxzsYl1OpvxkBItC9nVw1PSQc_b-eQMcmQFg011ab4b5",
  "customerId": "12345",
  "supportedAccountRange": "534403,518145,518152,5403,5424",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "termsAndConditionURL": "https://www.issuer.term-and-conditions.html",
  "privacyNoticeURL": "https://www.issuer.privacy-policy-url.html",
  "optOutURL": "https://www.issuer.opt-out-url.html",
  "preferredTheme": {
    "backgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "widgetBackgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "fontColor": "#000000",
    "barGraphColor": "#111111",
    "buttonColor": "#999999",
    "buttonTextColor": "#FFFFFF",
    "titleFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "titleFontSize": "28px",
    "subTitleFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "subTitleFontSize": "20px",
    "paragraphFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "paragraphFontSize": "15px",
    "buttonTextFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "buttonTextFontSize": "15px",
    "linkFontType": "Mark Offc For MC",
    "linkFontSize": "15px"
  }
}

response.name: This response code is returned when either a request is invalid or data provided in the request is in invalid format.
This response code is returned for unauthorized Issuer.
This response code is returned when the server cannot find the account which has been used to call the API.
This response code is returned when the MediaType in the request is other than application/json format.

item.name: Mastercard Allows Issuer to Enroll Cardholders to the Carbon Calculator Experience Platform.

request.name: Mastercard Allows Issuer to Enroll Cardholders to the Carbon Calculator Experience Platform.

description.content:
Used to enroll users for the Carbon Calculator Experience API so that
they can track the carbon usage for their transactions and provides
them with an option to donate towards tree plantation.

**Note-**
* If the issuer has opted for the Donation feature then the fields - *name, billing address, email, locale, cardholder name, card number, card base currency and card expiry date* fields are **mandatory** in the payload.
* This endpoint uses the Mastercard payload
  encryption. Refer to the **[Payload
  Encryption](https://developer.mastercard.com/platform/documentation/security-and-authentication/securing-sensitive-data-using-payload-encryption/#mastercard-encryption)**
  page for implementation details.

response.name: The response object contains Payment Card information after a successful registration.
This response code is returned when a request is invalid or data in the request is not valid or a card user is already registered on the server.
This response code is returned for unauthorized Issuer.
This response code is returned when the server cannot find the account which has been used to call the API.
This response code is returned when the MediaType in the request is other than application/json format.

description.content:
The Carbon Calculator Experience API enables issuers to provide their cardholders with visibility into their environmental impact and carbon footprint based on their spending habits. This API also provides cardholders with the option to make donations in support of environmental causes like forest restoration projects and support a positive impact on the environment.

Contact Support:
 Name: API Support
 Email: apisupport@mastercard.com
